full_text:
Liu Min еҠүж•Ҹ
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Liu Min (еҠүж•Ҹ)was born in Quan Ling county. Was of some renown, agreed with Wang PingвҖҷs Hanzhong plan. Liu Min was affiliated with the Shu Kingdom.
